archetype: Archetype 2 (The Performance Pro) & Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) hybrid
mood: Professional, precise, high-performance, analytical, tactical minimalism

layout_and_spacing.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID

surfaces_and_effects.card_style: Flat dark backgrounds (bg-[#0A0A0A]) with stark 1px solid borders (border-white/10). No soft shadows. 'Technical / Terminal' feel.
surfaces_and_effects.hover_state: Slight brightness increase (bg-[#1C1C1C]), no vertical lift. Maintain geometric rigidity.
surfaces_and_effects.glassmorphism: Not recommended for trading dashboards to avoid refraction of data. Stick to solid, opaque backgrounds for maximum contrast and legibility.
surfaces_and_effects.borders: Expose the grid. Use border-collapse patterns where applicable. Inner borders between table columns/rows should be border-white/5.

navigation.style: Vertical sidebar or compact top nav. High contrast active states with a sharp left border (border-l-2 border-blue-500).

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:outline-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.profit: bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2
buttons.loss: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2

inputs.style: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-sm focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 font-mono text-sm
inputs.labels: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 mb-1 block

tables.style: Dense tabular data. Text sizes text-xs to text-sm. Numbers MUST use JetBrains Mono. Right-align numerical data. Left-align text. Hover states on rows (hover:bg-white/5).
tables.headers: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500 border-b border-white/10 pb-2 font-sans font-medium

cards.metric_card: flex flex-col gap-1 border border-white/10 bg-[#0A0A0A] p-5. Label text-gray-400 text-xs uppercase. Value text-3xl font-mono text-white. Optional sparkline or % change indicator (green/red font-mono).

tags.style: px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono border

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Instantaneous. No long fades or bounces. Traders need speed.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Very fast, duration-100 or duration-150 ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.data_updates: Subtle background flash (green/red) when a ticker's data updates or a trade is logged, quickly fading back to transparent.

icons.usage: Use sparingly. 16px or 14px size. Mostly for directional indicators (TrendingUp, TrendingDown), menu items, and actions (Plus, Trash2, Edit).

charts_and_data_viz.equity_curve: Area chart with a gradient fill under the line (blue-500/20 to transparent). Sharp, straight lines (type='linear' or 'step'), not curves (type='monotone'), to reflect accurate discrete P&L jumps.
charts_and_data_viz.heatmap: Monthly performance grid. Cells colored based on net P&L. Dark red (heavy loss) -> Black/Dark Grey (flat) -> Bright Green (heavy profit).
charts_and_data_viz.bar_chart: For sector/strategy breakdown. Thin bars, no rounded corners, stark high-contrast colors.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on deep obsidian meets maximum contrast. For muted text, use #A0A0A0 minimum for AA compliance.
accessibility.focus_states: All inputs and buttons must have high-contrast focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:outline-none) for keyboard navigation.

media_and_assets.notes: No placeholder images needed. UI is completely data-driven. The user is a solo trader; functionality and screen real estate are paramount.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize data density. The user is a trader who needs to see as much information as possible without scrolling.
Ensure all numerical fields (Price, RS, ADR%, P&L, Position Size) strictly use JetBrains Mono or a monospace font configuration to ensure vertical alignment of digits.
For the Position Sizer, ensure the inputs (Account Size, Risk %, Entry Price, Stop Loss) auto-calculate the Position Size (Shares) and Total Risk ($) in real-time.
Color-code P&L and performance metrics: Positive values must be explicitly Green (#00C805), negative values explicitly Red (#FF3B30).

Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the complex, dense layouts rather than wrapping everything in heavy Shadcn Card components if it restricts layout freedom. Use Shadcn for inputs, dialogs, dropdowns, and select components.
Ensure the layout is responsive, but optimize primarily for desktop/laptop displays, as trading dashboards are rarely used optimally on mobile.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (e.g., add-ticker-btn, calculate-size-btn, log-trade-btn, trade-row, watchlist-row) to ensure testability.
